content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally across IT (+11% sector gap-up post Coforge), FMCG (Marico/Dabur), Auto (M&M, Bajaj), Defense (GRSE, HAL), Capital Goods (Titagarh, Polycab), and Financials (ABCAPITAL, CAMS) on positive Q4 results, strong global cues (Nasdaq +2.02%), and easing crude. The book is broadly in profit on Day 0 of these holdings — the priority now is locking in gains via SL trails, not adding correlated new exposure. Many positions already up 2-7% intraday with SLs still below entry, which creates avoidable give-back risk.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 984, CMP 1056.70 = +7.4% gain. SL already at 1035 (above entry, locking +5.2%). Trail-gap to CMP is 2.0% — within discipline. Target 1110 still ~5% away near 52w-high resistance. No-op MODIFY avoided: keeping current SL/target as they already lock meaningful profit. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already above entry 984 locks +5.2%. Strong Q4 (+19% PAT, GNPA 0.93%, RBI rate-cut tailwind). Holding for 1110 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 125.10, CMP 124.12 = -0.8%. SL 121 = -3.3% from entry, ~2.5% below CMP — within normal noise. MACD bearish crossover but macro hedge thesis intact. Hold to original SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1720.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1700, CMP 1757.10 = +3.4%. Trailing SL 1735→1720 — wait, current SL is 1735 already (above entry locking +2%). 1720 would be LOOSENING — REJECT this. Let me reconsider: keep SL at 1735 or raise tighter. CMP 1757, 1.0% trail gap = 1739.50. Raising SL to 1739 locks ~+2.3%. Trail-up only."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 4575, CMP 4630.40 = +1.2%. SL currently at 4570 (just below entry). Raise SL to entry 4575 (breakeven) per trailing mandate (≥2% would mandate breakeven; we're at 1.2% but new CMD catalyst + sector strength justifies pre-emptive breakeven shift). Trail-gap = 1.2% — at the floor; acceptable given strong order book."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 6900, CMP 7049 = +2.2%. SL already at 6960 (above entry, locks +0.9%). Trail-gap = 1.3% — within floor. Strong Q4 (+34% rev, +80% EBITDA), Chemours catalyst pending. Keep current SL/target — no-op MODIFY. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 above entry 6900 already locks profit. Trail-gap 1.3% within floor. Strong Q4 fundamentals."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 838, CMP 845.20 = +0.9%. SL at 836 already (just below entry, -0.2%). Trail-gap to CMP = 1.1%. Per +2% trail rule, not yet triggered (only +0.9%). Keep current SL. No-op MODIFY → HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.9% gain, SL just below entry. Wait for 2%+ before trailing to BE."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 369, CMP 368.70 = -0.1%. SL 365 = -1.1% from entry, well within budget. At 52w-high; Q4 PAT +31%, NBFC AUM +27%. Hold to original 388 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 820, CMP 822.55 = +0.3%. SL 815 = -0.6%. Trail not yet triggered. Strong Q4 (+22% rev, 9% volume), copra tailwind. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1259, CMP 1279.10 = +1.6%. SL 1260 already at +0.08% above entry (effectively breakeven). Trail-gap 1.5%. Keep — no-op → HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven. +1.6% gain. Hold to 1330 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 3025, CMP 3034 = +0.3%. SL 3000 = -0.8% within budget. Defense rally + Rs 33,000 cr corvette L1 catalyst. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 806, CMP 807.30 = +0.2%. SL 798 = -1.0%. No trail trigger. No-op → HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal +0.2%. Hold original SL/target. Q4 beat + 68% MF RTA market share."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GABRIEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Board meeting May 13 (4 sessions away — outside the 3-session binary window but close). Stock up 13% in 2 days, overbought ahead of results. Pass — capital already heavily deployed in similar momentum names."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 but already at 52w-high (8722) with CMP 8461; +1.4% only today suggests post-results profit-booking starting. Capital Goods cluster already represented via TITAGARH + GRSE — cluster discipline limits further additions."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 PAT +42% but stock already +5.7% today and rallied into results. Chasing post-event move at premium with limited R:R."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HDFCBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Modest Q4 (+8% PAT, NII +3.2%), post-merger drag. Sector NEUTRAL stance. Below confidence threshold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +5.2% above entry. Trail-gap 2% — well within discipline. Let winner run to 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; -0.8% within noise. SL gives ~2.5% room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1739.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1735 to 1739 (locks +2.3%). Trail-gap 1.0% (at floor). +3.4% gain warrants tighter lock."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL from 4570 to entry 4575 (breakeven). Trail-gap to CMP 4630 = 1.2% (at floor). Removes downside risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry already locks profit. Trail-gap 1.3%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "reasoning": "Only +0.9% — trail trigger (+2%) not yet hit. SL near entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.1%. SL room 1.1%. Strong Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "+0.3% — no trail trigger yet. Strong fundamentals."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven already. +1.6% gain. Trail-gap 1.5%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "+0.3% only. SL within budget. Defense catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal +0.2%. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GABRIEL board meeting May 13 — re-evaluate post-results. POLYCAB and M&M are quality names but chased post-Q4; wait for pullback to 20-DMA. HDFCBANK below confidence threshold; SBIN Q4 tomorrow may give a sector cue. Capital Goods cluster (TITAGARH, GRSE held) is at limit — no further additions today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is broadly green on Day 0 of holdings with 11 CNC positions deployed. Cluster check: Financial Services has PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS = ~28% of capital — at watch level, no further FS additions. Capital Goods has HAL + TITAGARH + GRSE — at cluster limit. No new entries this tick — focus is locking in gains via SL trails on ADANIPORTS (+3.4%) and HAL (to BE). HFCL pending order from 1916m ago should be reviewed/cancelled if stale (separate cycle). Cash buffer healthy. Cumulative -53.72% needs careful capital preservation; no chasing post-event names."
}
